# Copilot Agent Export

This file defines the Copilot prompt pack available in this repository.

## Export Map

- Skill:
  - `.github/prompts/deploy-to-publish.md`

- Workflows:
  - `.github/prompts/execute-plan.md`

  - `.github/prompts/multi-agent-plan.md`

  - `.github/prompts/multi-agent-plan-budget-mode.md`

  - `.github/prompts/multi-agent-plan-ultra-budget-mode.md`
 
- Router:
  - `.github/prompts/prompt-router.md`

## Usage

- Open the corresponding prompt file and paste it into Copilot Chat when needed.
- Use `prompt-router.md` as a single entry point when you want Copilot to choose the right workflow.
